releaseNotes:
- Introduced Top, Trending, and Latest JioSaavn online playlists.

- Team Netra

changelog.text: Delivered a comprehensive UI/UX overhaul with modern design elements including glassmorphism, animations, responsive layouts, and redesigned skeleton loaders.
Enhanced Party Room experience with WhatsApp-style reverse chat scrolling and real-time typing indicators.
Introduced a premium Bottom Sheet-based Sleep Timer with an interactive dashboard and improved usability.
Resolved Settings AppBar positioning issues and ensured proper cleanup of dialogs and session states on party exit.
Optimized Provider state management and TV player rendering to reduce unnecessary rebuilds and improve overall performance.

lockMessage: The app is temporarily locked for maintenance. Please check back later.
